septal
  • API reference
  • SolverFactory
  • View page source

SolverFactory

SolverFactory — creates the right solver backend from a configuration key.

Supported solver types

"general_constrained_nlp"

CasADi / IPOPT multi-start (via CasadiSolver).

"box_constrained_nlp"

JAXopt L-BFGS-B multi-start (via JaxSolver).

class septal.casadax.factory.SolverFactory(cfg, solver_type)[source]

Bases: object

Factory that instantiates and holds a solver for a given NLP.

Parameters:

  • cfg (Any) – Sub-config for the solver (must contain n_starts, max_solution_time, jax_opt_options.error_tol, etc.).

  • solver_type (str) – One of "general_constrained_nlp" or "box_constrained_nlp".

construct_solver()[source]
Return type:

None

classmethod from_method(cfg, solver_type, objective_func, bounds, constraints_func=None, constraint_lhs=None, constraint_rhs=None)[source]

Build a factory from individual components (legacy / low-level entry).

Parameters:

  • cfg (Any) – Solver configuration.

  • solver_type (str) – Backend type.

  • objective_func (Callable) – Pre-built objective (CasADi callback or JAX callable).

  • bounds (List[Any]) – [lb, ub].

  • constraints_func (Callable | None) – Optional pre-built constraint callback.

  • constraint_lhs (Any | None) – Bounds on g(x).

  • constraint_rhs (Any | None) – Bounds on g(x).

Return type:

SolverFactory

classmethod from_problem(cfg, solver_type, problem)[source]

Build a factory and construct the solver from an NLPProblem.

Parameters:

  • cfg (Any) – Solver configuration.

  • solver_type (str) – "general_constrained_nlp" or "box_constrained_nlp".

  • problem (NLPProblem) – The NLP to solve.

Returns:

Factory with solver ready to call.

Return type:

SolverFactory

initial_guess()[source]
Return type:

Any

load_bounds(bounds)[source]
Return type:

None

load_constraints(constraints_func, lhs=None, rhs=None)[source]
Return type:

None

load_objective(objective_func)[source]
Return type:

None

solve(initial_guesses)[source]
Return type:

SolveResult
